svg.font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, sans-serif
svg.text: A dependable glue layer — honest about its edges
Strong as a research-engineering story: tested, typed, and proven equal to the original. Deliberately narrow in scope.

g.text: proven to match the original, to the millionth
tested on two Python versions, types checked
coverage kept above 80% on every build
a clean, installable package, not loose scripts
delegates the heavy math to a proven solver
→ not a clinical tool — it's research software
→ not published yet (release setup ready, none shipped)
→ local-only — a single import, no CLI or service
→ leans on an external solver for the heavy math
→ you bring the heart model and wiring; it's the glue

svg.text: The point of the project is trust through reproducibility — every limit is stated, not hidden.
